title: Brainier Bees
description: Rewrites, improves, and fixes Bee behavior in the modern Brain AI system!
body: This mod rewrites Bee AI using Mojang's modern Brain system for more consistent and reliable behavior. Their homes are memorized more effectively and their pathing has been optimized for both performance and stability. **Bees will no longer arbitrarily fly away from their homes or get stuck in the sky.** This mod effectively fixes: \ [MC-206401](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-206401) \ [MC-190261](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-190261) \ [MC-190042](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-190042) \ [MC-276167](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-276167) \ [MC-174348](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-174348) \ [MC-160394](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-160394) It is only required on the server. Don't worry about getting it on your client unless you want it on singleplayer. Icon made by [xirobi](https://xirobi.carrd.co/)!
